rationale: The citing paper uses Kumar, Sunder, and Leone (2014) to frame its contribution, explicitly noting that the SFV framework acknowledged the omission of turnover modeling as a limitation. The authors then state in the discussion that their turnover model builds on that prior sales force value management work by helping managers diagnose and manage turnover risk. This gives the citation a clear positioning role in defining what the new paper adds, beyond a passing background mention.
relation_description: The citing paper positions itself as extending Kumar, Sunder, and Leone (2014) by adding salesperson turnover behavior and risk diagnostics to sales force value management. It treats turnover modeling as a missing component in the prior framework and presents the current study as filling that gap.
